The Egyptian Cotton Collection

The sheets the
hotels hope you
never leave.

Long-staple Egyptian cotton, woven to a 600-thread-count sateen that only grows softer with every wash. It's the standard we set for the country's finest hotels — now made for your own bedroom.

Family-owned since 1980

From a Durban
fabric store to
the nation's homes.

We began in 1980 as a modest, family-run fabric store on a Durban high street. Forty-five years on, we dress the beds, bathrooms and windows of homes and hospitality across South Africa — with the same eye for cloth, colour and craft we started with.

Years of craft
